description_long: This is a disposable coffee cup, commonly found in urban environments such as cafes, sidewalks, and public parks. The cup features a textured red sleeve with the slogan 'GREAT COFFEE IS NOT THE RESULT OF CHANCE' printed in white, providing both insulation and grip. The main body of the cup is white, and it is topped with a fitted white plastic lid that appears slightly crumpled, suggesting it has been used or discarded. The cup is cylindrical, tapering towards the bottom, and lacks a handle. The lid has a raised rim and a recessed center, typical of takeaway coffee cups. The overall appearance is that of a lightweight, single-use item made primarily from paper and plastic.
description: A disposable coffee cup with a red textured sleeve, white body, and a fitted white plastic lid, featuring printed text.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from an angle showing the red sleeve, white lid, and some handwritten markings near the rim.
description_view_1: The back of the cup is visible, mostly showing the white lid and the dark, shadowed side of the cup with minimal text.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the red sleeve and the white lid, with the cup's tapered shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: The front view displays the printed slogan on the red sleeve and the full circular shape of the lid.
